title: Passing Constructor Data
description: Pass a message string to a second screen through its constructor.
problemStatement:
Send data forward! Modify the previous task so the `SettingsPage` takes a `final String userRole` in its constructor. When navigating, pass the value `'Admin'`.

**Requirement:** Display the `userRole` in the center of the `SettingsPage`.
hints: Include `final String userRole;` and `const SettingsPage({required this.userRole});` in the second class.
expectedOutput: The second screen displays the word 'Admin'.
